mapper.select:
select * from testinfoRoom, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable where roomtable.room_id=testinfoRoom.room_id and testinfotable.testinfo_id=testinfoRoom.testinfo_id and testtable.test_id=testinfotable.test_id and ""=""
and testinfoRoom.testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id}
mapper.update:
update testinfoRoom
testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id},
room_id = #{room_id},
rquota = #{rquota},
where testinfoRoom_id = #{testinfoRoom_id}
